expectations.evidence: Queried zmluvy table for ICO 31322832, found contracts with existing uvo_url in Step 1
Found 10 contracts with UVO links: 5 on UVO portal, 3 on Josephine, 2 on EKS
Step 2 found 1 contract >50K EUR without UVO (Statna skolska inspekcia 56,791.56 EUR)
Output has Sumar section, per-contract CRZ data tables, zlte stopy tables, hodnotenie per contract, and closing summary
Celkove hodnotenie section: 'SLOVNAFT ma relativne dobru evidenciu obstaravania', notes 2 DANGER flags on pokuty, 1 contract without UVO
